chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: The initials GPT stand for Generative Pre-trained Transformer.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: So that first word is straightforward enough, these are bots that generate new text.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: Pre-trained refers to how the model went through a process of learning from a massive amount of data,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: and the prefix insinuates that there's more room to fine-tune it on specific tasks with additional training.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: But the last word, that's the real key piece.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: A transformer is a specific kind of neural network, a machine learning model,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: and it's the core invention underlying the current boom in AI.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: What I want to do with this video and the following chapters

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: is go through a visually driven explanation for what actually happens inside a transformer.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: We're going to follow the data that flows through it and go step by step.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: There are many different kinds of models that you can build using transformers.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: Some models take in audio and produce a transcript.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: This sentence comes from a model going the other way around,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: producing synthetic speech just from text.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: All those tools that took the world by storm in 2022,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: like Dolly and Midjourney that take in a text description and produce an image,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: And even if I can't quite get it to understand what a pie creature is supposed to be,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: I'm still blown away that this kind of thing is even remotely possible.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: And the original transformer, introduced in 2017 by Google,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: was invented for the specific use case of translating text from one language into another.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: But the variant that you and I will focus on,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: which is the type that underlies tools like ChatGPT,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: will be a model that's trained to take in a piece of text,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: maybe even with some surrounding images or sound accompanying it,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: and produce a prediction for what comes next in the passage.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: That prediction takes the form of a probability distribution

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: over many different chunks of text that might follow.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: At first glance, you might think that predicting the next word

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: feels like a very different goal from generating new text.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: But once you have a prediction model like this,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: a simple thing you could try to make it generate a longer piece of text

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: is to give it an initial snippet to work with,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: have it take a random sample from the distribution it just generated,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: append that sample to the text,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: and then run the whole process again to make a new prediction,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: based on all the new text, including what it just added.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: but it really doesn't feel like this should actually work.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: In this animation, for example, I'm running GPT-2 on my laptop,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: and having it repeatedly predict and sample the next chunk of text

chunks.text: to generate a story based on the seed text.

chunks.text: And the story just doesn't actually really make that much sense.

chunks.text: But if I swap it out for API calls to GPT-3 instead,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: which is the same basic model, just much bigger,

chunks.text: suddenly, almost magically, we do get a sensible story,

chunks.text: This process here of repeated prediction and sampling

chunks.text: is essentially what's happening when you interact with ChatGPT

chunks.text: or any of these other large language models,

chunks.text: for each new word that it chooses.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: First, the input is broken up into a bunch of little pieces.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning

chunks.text: and in the case of text,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: or little chunks of that sound.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: Each one of these tokens is then associated with a vector,

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning

chunks.text: which is meant to somehow encode the meaning of that piece.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: If you think of these vectors as giving coordinates

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: This sequence of vectors then passes through an operation

chunks.text: that's known as an attention block,

chunks.text: and this allows the vectors to talk to each other

chunks.text: and pass information back and forth to update their values.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: For example, the meaning of the word model

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning
chunks.text: in the phrase a machine learning model

chunks.text: is different from its meaning in the phrase a fashion model.

chunks.title: Transformers, the tech behind LLMs Deep Learning

chunks.text: And again, whenever I use the word meaning,

chunks.text: in the entries of those vectors.
